title: Dense Romantic Portuguese Tamarind Bake
description: A rich and dense dessert featuring the tartness of tamarind paste, evoking the romance of Portugal. Perfect for a special occasion or date night.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, use an electric mixer to beat together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, followed by the vanilla extract.
With the mixer on low speed, gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Stir in the tamarind paste, walnuts, and heavy cream.
Pour the batter into a 9-inch round baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Transfer the dish to a serving plate and let it cool completely before slicing and serving.
Dust with powdered sugar and serve with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream, if desired.
